published.subawardDescription:
"Omega Morgan Quote 5650-26: MSVL Airbag Launch Vancouver, WA (374K) - 2027 / 2028. 

SCOPE OF WORK:
Mobilize crew and equipment to Vigor Vancouver, WA
Vigor to load onto their SPMT
- 1 x MSVL 120’L x 27’W @ 374,786 lbs
Vigor to transport cargo to boat ramp
Set on cribbing, remove SPMT and jack down
Launch cargo using Omega Morgan air bags
Provide (2) Prime Movers as hold backs for launch
Provide Skiff to help launch
Demobilize crew and equipment upon completion

September 2027 Launch (3rd MSVL- LRIP 3) - Airbags Only $126,586.00
February 2028 Launch (4th MSVL- LRIP 4) - Airbags Only $133,549.00"
CABLE, ANNEALED COPPER, 2 CONDUCTOR, 1/0 AWG, LOW SMOKE, 1kV, M24643/15-08UN, LSDSGU-100
